sections.about: Turnover captures the scale of operating revenue disclosed under BRSR Section A — General Disclosures, primarily through products/services sold and CSR financial details. It is not a Principle 1–9 Essential or Leadership indicator; it is a Section A business profile disclosure. A higher value indicates better performance.
sections.performanceAndDrivers: On a normalised INR crore basis, Tata Steel moved from ₹129,007 crore in FY2022-23 to ₹140,987.43 crore in FY2023-24, before moderating to ₹132,516.66 crore in FY2024-25. JSW stayed close to Tata at ₹130,039 crore, ₹133,609 crore, and ₹125,678 crore across the three years, reflecting a large flat/long carbon steel platform but below Tata in FY2024 and FY2025. SAIL was structurally lower but stable at ₹104,447.36 crore in FY2022-23 and ₹104,545.09 crore in FY2023-24, then declined to ₹101,716 crore in FY2024-25; its FY2022-23 annual report attributes the operating environment to global energy crisis, inflationary pressure, supply-chain disruption, interest-rate hikes, and steel-price volatility, while domestic demand was supported by infrastructure and manufacturing spend. Jindal Stainless increased consistently from ₹34,849 crore to ₹38,356 crore and ₹40,182 crore, but remains much smaller in absolute turnover because it is a stainless-focused, more specialised portfolio rather than a broad integrated carbon-steel platform.
sections.tataPositioning: In FY2024-25, Tata Steel ranked 1st on turnover. JSW was closest at ₹125,678 crore, around 5.2% below Tata’s ₹132,516.66 crore. Tata’s rank improved from 2nd in FY2022-23 to 1st in FY2023-24 and stayed 1st in FY2024-25, despite the decline in absolute turnover from FY2023-24. The rank improvement was driven by Tata retaining a marginally larger standalone revenue base than JSW and a broader business mix, while SAIL remained behind due to lower turnover scale and Jindal Stainless remained structurally smaller despite its strong growth trajectory.
sections.comparabilityNotes: Rankings use INR crore-normalised values for consistency.
